sections.heading: Findings
sections.content: Benchmark Deployment Strategy: {"deploy_success_rate":0.883,"rollback_rate":0.88,"time_to_deploy_ms":0.807}. No significant improvement. Experiment "Deployment Strategy A/B Test (replay)": treatment improved over control (confidence=0.88). Benchmark Deployment Strategy: {"deploy_success_rate":0.813,"rollback_rate":0.87,"time_to_deploy_ms":0.82}. No significant improvement. Experiment "Blue/Green vs Rolling Comparison": treatment did not improve over control (confidence=0.76). Blue/green did not outperform rolling deployment.
